Uses of Class
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.TermBuilder

Packages that use TermBuilder
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.tacletbuilder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init
This package contains classes handling prover initialisation.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.mgt
This package contains classes for proof environments and proof management.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule
This package contains classes for implementing rules.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util
This package is a grab bag of miscellaneous useful code fragments.
de.uka.ilkd.key.wd

    ExecutionVariable.computeValueCondition(TermBuilder tb, List<Goal> valueGoals, InitConfig initConfig)

    ExecutionVariable.instantiateValuesFromSideProof(InitConfig initConfig, Services services, TermBuilder tb, ApplyStrategyInfo<Proof,Goal> info, Operator resultOperator, JTerm siteProofSelectTerm, JTerm siteProofCondition)
